title: cardamine ovata f. lehmannii
intro: Cardamine ovata f. lehmannii, also known as the lesser celandine, is a perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of lesser celandine include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy for various health concerns.
